THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSE OF BRANHAM A CORP. DBA COLONIAL HOME PRODUCTS & NATIONAL ACCEPTANCE CO. WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JUBILO, RACHEL M JUBILO, DEOCHITO P.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JUBILO, RACHEL M JUBILO, DEOCHITO P.
